members.name: AddSpatialEntity
members.signature: public RID AddSpatialEntity(RID spatialContext, int entityId, int entity)
members.summary: Registers an entity that was created directly on the OpenXR runtime.

members.name: CreateSpatialContext
members.signature: public OpenXRFutureResult CreateSpatialContext(OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationBaseHeader[] capabilityConfigurations, OpenXRStructureBase next, Callable userCallback)
members.summary: Creates a new spatial context that handles entities for the provided capability configurations. [param capability_configurations] is an array of [OpenXRSpatialCapabilityConfigurationBaseHeader] with the needed capability configuration data. [param next] is an optional parameter that can contain additional information for creating our spatial context. [b]Note:[/b] This is an asynchronous method and returns an [OpenXRFutureResult] object with which to track the status, discarding this object will not cancel the creation process. On success [param user_callback] will be called if specified. The result data for this function is the [RID] for our spatial context.

members.name: DiscoverSpatialEntities
members.signature: public OpenXRFutureResult DiscoverSpatialEntities(RID spatialContext, PackedInt64Array componentTypes, OpenXRStructureBase next, Callable userCallback)
members.summary: Starts a new discovery query, this will gather all objects tracked by the [param spatial_context] that have at least one of the component types specified in [param component_types]. [param next] is an optional parameter that can contain additional information for executing the discovery query. [b]Note:[/b] This is an asynchronous method and returns an [OpenXRFutureResult] object with which to track the status, discarding this object will not cancel the discovery process. On success [param user_callback] will be called if specified. The result data for this function is the [RID] for our snapshot.

members.name: DiscoverSpatialEntitiesWithComponentData
members.signature: public OpenXRFutureResult DiscoverSpatialEntitiesWithComponentData(RID spatialContext, OpenXRSpatialComponentData[] componentData, OpenXRStructureBase next, Callable userCallback)
members.summary: Convenience method when the caller only has an [Array] of [OpenXRSpatialComponentData] and needs to discover spatial entities.

members.name: FindSpatialEntity
members.signature: public RID FindSpatialEntity(int entityId)
members.summary: Returns the [RID] for the specified spatial entity ID.

members.name: FreeSpatialContext
members.signature: public void FreeSpatialContext(RID spatialContext)
members.summary: Frees a spatial context previously created when calling [method create_spatial_context]. If the spatial context creation is still ongoing, the asynchronous process is cancelled.

members.name: FreeSpatialEntity
members.signature: public void FreeSpatialEntity(RID entity)
members.summary: Frees an entity previously created when calling [method add_spatial_entity] or [method make_spatial_entity].

members.name: FreeSpatialSnapshot
members.signature: public void FreeSpatialSnapshot(RID spatialSnapshot)
members.summary: Frees a spatial snapshot previously created when calling [method discover_spatial_entities]. If the spatial snapshot creation is still ongoing, the asynchronous process is cancelled.

members.name: GetFloatBuffer
members.signature: public PackedFloat32Array GetFloatBuffer(RID spatialSnapshot, int bufferId)
members.summary: Returns a buffer with floats from a buffer that was retrieved when taking a snapshot.

members.name: GetSpatialContextHandle
members.signature: public int GetSpatialContextHandle(RID spatialContext)
members.summary: Returns the OpenXR spatial context handle for this snapshot. [b]Note:[/b] This method is intended to be used from GDExtensions that implement spatial entity capability handlers.

members.name: GetSpatialContextReady
members.signature: public bool GetSpatialContextReady(RID spatialContext)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the spatial context finished its creation and is ready to be used.

members.name: GetSpatialEntityContext
members.signature: public RID GetSpatialEntityContext(RID entity)
members.summary: Returns the spatial context for this entity.

members.name: GetSpatialEntityId
members.signature: public int GetSpatialEntityId(RID entity)
members.summary: Returns the internal [code]XrSpatialEntityIdEXT[/code] associated with the entity.

members.name: GetSpatialSnapshotContext
members.signature: public RID GetSpatialSnapshotContext(RID spatialSnapshot)
members.summary: Returns the spatial context related to this spatial snapshot.

members.name: GetSpatialSnapshotHandle
members.signature: public int GetSpatialSnapshotHandle(RID spatialSnapshot)
members.summary: Returns the OpenXR spatial snapshot handle for this snapshot. [b]Note:[/b] This method is intended to be used from GDExtensions that implement spatial entity capability handlers.

members.name: GetString
members.signature: public String GetString(RID spatialSnapshot, int bufferId)
members.summary: Returns a string from a buffer that was retrieved when taking a snapshot.

members.name: GetUint8Buffer
members.signature: public PackedByteArray GetUint8Buffer(RID spatialSnapshot, int bufferId)
members.summary: Returns a buffer with 8 bit ints from a buffer that was retrieved when taking a snapshot.

members.name: GetUint16Buffer
members.signature: public PackedInt32Array GetUint16Buffer(RID spatialSnapshot, int bufferId)
members.summary: Returns a buffer with 16 bit ints from a buffer that was retrieved when taking a snapshot.

members.name: GetUint32Buffer
members.signature: public PackedInt32Array GetUint32Buffer(RID spatialSnapshot, int bufferId)
members.summary: Returns a buffer with 32 bit ints from a buffer that was retrieved when taking a snapshot.

members.name: GetVector2Buffer
members.signature: public PackedVector2Array GetVector2Buffer(RID spatialSnapshot, int bufferId)
members.summary: Returns a buffer with [Vector2] entries from a buffer that was retrieved when taking a snapshot.

members.name: GetVector3Buffer
members.signature: public PackedVector3Array GetVector3Buffer(RID spatialSnapshot, int bufferId)
members.summary: Returns a buffer with [Vector3] entries from a buffer that was retrieved when taking a snapshot.

members.name: MakeSpatialEntity
members.signature: public RID MakeSpatialEntity(RID spatialContext, int entityId)
members.summary: Creates a new entity for this [param entity_id]. The [param spatial_context] should match the context that discovered the entity.

members.name: QuerySnapshot
members.signature: public bool QuerySnapshot(RID spatialSnapshot, OpenXRSpatialComponentData[] componentData, OpenXRStructureBase next)
members.summary: Queries the snapshot data. This will find all entities in the snapshot that contain all requested components in [param component_data]. The objects held within [param component_data] will then be populated with the queried data. [param component_data] must always have an object of [OpenXRSpatialQueryResultData] as the first entry. [param next] is an optional parameter that can contain additional information passed when setting our query conditions.

members.name: SupportsCapability
members.signature: public bool SupportsCapability(int capability)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this spatial entity [param capability] is supported by the hardware used.

members.name: SupportsComponentType
members.signature: public bool SupportsComponentType(int capability, int componentType)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this [param capability] supports the [param component_type].

members.name: UpdateSpatialEntities
members.signature: public RID UpdateSpatialEntities(RID spatialContext, RID[] entities, PackedInt64Array componentTypes, OpenXRStructureBase next)
members.summary: Performs a snapshot for a limited number of entities. This is NOT an asynchronous method and will return the snapshot immediately.

signals.name: SpatialDiscoveryRecommended
signals.summary: Emitted when OpenXR recommends running a discovery query because entities managed by this spatial context have (likely) changed.

values.name: CAPABILITY_MARKER_TRACKING_APRIL_TAG
values.summary: April tag based marker tracking capability.

values.name: CAPABILITY_MARKER_TRACKING_ARUCO_MARKER
values.summary: Aruco marker based marker tracking capability.

values.name: CAPABILITY_MARKER_TRACKING_MICRO_QR_CODE
values.summary: Micro QR code based marker tracking capability.

values.name: CAPABILITY_MARKER_TRACKING_QR_CODE
values.summary: QR code based marker tracking capability.

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_ANCHOR
values.summary: Component that provides the location for an anchor. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentAnchorListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrPosef[/code] (Added by the [code]XR_EXT_spatial_anchor[/code] extension).

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_BOUNDED_2D
values.summary: Component that provides the 2D bounds for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentBounded2DListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialBounded2DDataEXT[/code].

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_BOUNDED_3D
values.summary: Component that provides the 3D bounds for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentBounded3DListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrBoxf[/code].

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_MARKER
values.summary: A component describing the marker type, ID and location. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentMarkerListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialMarkerDataEXT[/code] (Added by the [code]XR_EXT_spatial_marker_tracking[/code] extension).

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_MESH_2D
values.summary: Component that provides a 2D mesh for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentMesh2DListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialMeshDataEXT[/code] (Added by the [code]XR_EXT_spatial_plane_tracking[/code] extension).

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_MESH_3D
values.summary: Component that provides a 3D mesh for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentMesh3DListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialMeshDataEXT[/code].

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_PARENT
values.summary: Component that provides the XrSpatialEntityIdEXT of the parent for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentParentListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialEntityIdEXT[/code].

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_PERSISTENCE
values.summary: Component that provides the persisted UUID for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentPersistenceListEXT; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialPersistenceDataEXT[/code] (Added by the [code]XR_EXT_spatial_persistence[/code] extension).

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_PLANE_ALIGNMENT
values.summary: Component that provides the plane alignment enum for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentPlaneAlignmentListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialPlaneAlignmentEXT[/code] (Added by the [code]XR_EXT_spatial_plane_tracking[/code] extension).

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_PLANE_SEMANTIC_LABEL
values.summary: Component that provides a semantic label for a plane. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentPlaneSemanticLabelListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialPlaneSemanticLabelEXT[/code] (Added by the [code]XR_EXT_spatial_plane_tracking[/code] extension).

values.name: COMPONENT_TYPE_POLYGON_2D
values.summary: Component that provides a 2D boundary polygon for a spatial entity. The corresponding list structure is [code]XrSpatialComponentPolygon2DListEXT[/code]; the corresponding data structure is [code]XrSpatialPolygon2DDataEXT[/code] (Added by the [code]XR_EXT_spatial_plane_tracking[/code] extension).
